name: The Ultimate Sugar Cookie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. In a large bowl, combine sugar and Butter Flavor Crisco. Beat at medium speed of an electric mixer until well blended. Add eggs, corn syrup, and vanilla. Beat well.
3. In another bowl, combine flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. Gradually add to the creamed mixture at low speed. Mix until well blended. Divide dough into quarters. If the dough is too sticky or soft to roll, wrap each quarter of dough with plastic wrap and refrigerate for 1 hour. Keep refrigerated until ready to roll.
4. Place a large sheet of wax paper on a work surface.
5. Place a quarter of dough on the floured wax paper. Flatten slightly, turn over, and cover with another sheet of wax paper. Roll the dough to 1/4-inch thickness. Cut out with a floured cutter. Transfer cookies to an ungreased baking sheet, 2 inches apart. Sprinkle with decorations or leave plain to frost when cooled.
6. Bake at 375°F for 5-9 minutes (bake smaller, thinner cut-outs closer to 5 minutes, larger cut-outs closer to 9 minutes).
7. Do not overbake. Allow cookies to cool on the baking sheet for 2 minutes before removing to a cooling rack. Frost if desired.
